prompt:
Portrait shot on 50mm f/2, medium close-up of a Japanese woman in her early 20s, soft round face, large dark eyes rimmed with natural lashes, gaze directed slightly upward toward rain-streaked window, chin resting on folded arms, expression: melancholic and still. She wears a translucent white cotton oversized shirt, slightly see-through at shoulder.

Upper body framing, subject seated leaning forward on a table surface, rain-blurred glass window behind fills the background, moody and soft.

Overcast rainy-day light, cool grey-blue tones, flat shadowless illumination from window, background bokeh of raindrops on glass.

Photographic texture and quality: film grain visible throughout, subtle stray hairs, faint moisture texture on skin surface, Fuji Superia 400 muted palette, low saturation, slight green-grey cast in shadows.

Avoid: harsh shadows, warm tones, AI-smooth skin, strong contrast.

--ar 9:16
